_doc: ROH × gene-model intersection product for page5 extension (Plot A cumulative gene-burden stack + Plot B biotype × peak heatmap-table). Round-1 ships an empty stub — page5 detects the empty payload and renders the standard ROH composition view without the burden cards. Populate from the upstream pipeline (catfish-diversity-analysis + genome-atlas; see SPEC_2026-05-12_roh_gene_burden.md §4 for the schema and §6 for the unresolved data-side decisions — constraint proxy in particular).
